title: Gear Aid Zip Care Zipper Cleaner Lubricant Outdoor Camping and Hiking Repair
description:
The Zip Care Zipper Cleaner and Lubricant is the ideal zipper care for metal, nylon or plastic zippers. It features a pull-push brush top that enables the cleaner to be easily distributed between the zipper teeth and will physically remove harmful dirt and other debris that can jam your zipper. Designed for use on wet and dry suits, gear bags, clothing and environmental suits, you'll be able to prolong the life of your zippers with Zip Care. The lubricating system is specifically formulated to lubricate and clean zippers. It will rinse away after submerged in water, leaving a unique protective film that will continue to lubricate without collecting unsightly residue. Make sure to keep Zip Care around to ensure that your zippers and gear are usable at all times!

Gear Aid Zip Care Zipper Cleaner Lubricant Outdoor Camping and Hiking Repair

The Zip Care Zipper Cleaner and Lubricant is the ideal zipper care for metal, nylon or plastic zippers. It features a pull-push brush top that enables the cleaner to be easily distributed between the zipper teeth and will physically remove harmful dirt and other debris that can jam your zipper.

Key Features

  • Volume of Bottle: 2 fl oz
  • Extends Zipper Life
  • First Step in Long-Term Zipper Care
  • Ideal for Use on Wet Suits, Dry Suits, Gear Bags, Booties & More
  • Precleaner for High-Tech Dry Suit Zippers

Product Specifications

  • MPN: MZCZL-1-719
  • UPC: 156985541004
  • Color: Clear
  • Size: 2 oz

Designed for use on wet and dry suits, gear bags, clothing and environmental suits, you'll be able to prolong the life of your zippers with Zip Care.

The lubricating system is specifically formulated to lubricate and clean zippers. It will rinse away after submerged in water, leaving a unique protective film that will continue to lubricate without collecting unsightly residue.

Make sure to keep Zip Care around to ensure that your zippers and gear are usable at all times!
